Sandbox_EPR_AssessmentTimeMinutes_toolti: Base time for the damage assessment stage. Default: 30 minutes
Sandbox_EPR_BreakdownWarningEnabled_tool: Show warnings when facility health is critically low. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_BuildingMaintenanceDays_tool: Days a connected building runs before its EPR connection needs maintenance. Lower = more demanding upkeep. Default: 14
Sandbox_EPR_CalibrationTimeMinutes_toolt: Base time for the calibration stage. Default: 90 minutes
Sandbox_EPR_DebugMode_tooltip: Show debug information in console. Default: Off
Sandbox_EPR_DegradationRate_tooltip: How fast facilities lose health over time. Higher = faster degradation. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_FieldComponentCount_tooltip: Number of additional repair points to fix after the main control panel. Default: 2
Sandbox_EPR_GeneratorAutoConnect_tooltip: Generators automatically connect to nearby buildings. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_GeneratorFuelConsumption_too: Fuel consumption rate for portable generators. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_IBCompatMode_tooltip: When Immersive Blackouts is active, EPR yields global power control and uses per-building electricity only. Disable to force EPR to override IB's SandboxVars. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_LouisvillePlantEnabled_toolt: Enable the Louisville Combined Utility Plant. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_MaintenancePartMultiplier_to: Multiplies the items consumed to maintain a connected building's EPR link. Higher = more demanding upkeep. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_ManualPumpEnabled_tooltip: Allow manual pumping from water tanks without power. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_MinElectricalSkill_tooltip: Minimum Electrical skill to repair power substations. Default: 7
Sandbox_EPR_MinMetalworkSkill_tooltip: Minimum Welding skill to repair power substations. Default: 4
Sandbox_EPR_PartReplacementTimeMinutes_t: Base time for the part replacement stage. Default: 360 minutes (6 hours)
Sandbox_EPR_PartRequirementMultiplier_to: Multiplies the parts needed for facility repairs. Higher = more demanding (up to 8x). Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_RandomBreakdownEnabled_toolt: Enable random breakdowns for low-health facilities. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_RepairNoiseRadius_tooltip: How far repair sounds travel (in tiles). Default: 100
Sandbox_EPR_RepairSpeedMultiplier_toolti: Multiplies all repair times. Lower = faster repairs. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_RequirePowerOff_tooltip: Only allow repairs after vanilla power shuts off. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_RequirePrerequisite_tooltip: Must repair Louisville Combined Plant before other facilities. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_RequireTools_tooltip: Require specific tools to perform repairs. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_ShowMapOverlay_tooltip: Draw EPR power/water zone coverage boxes and facility markers on the world map. Opt-in. Default: Off
Sandbox_EPR_SkillRequirementMultiplier_t: Multiplies all skill requirements. Lower = easier. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_SpriteGeneratorVirtualOnly_t: Use virtual power only (no physical generator object). Turn off for legacy generator behavior. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_StartupDefenseTimeMinutes_to: Time you must defend the facility during startup. Default: 5 minutes
Sandbox_EPR_StartupNoiseRadius_tooltip: How far startup sounds travel (in tiles). Startup is LOUD! Default: 150
Sandbox_EPR_ToolsConsumed_tooltip: Tools lose durability when used for repairs. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_WaterPlantElectricalSkill_to: Minimum Electrical skill to repair water plants. Default: 5
Sandbox_EPR_WaterPlantMetalworkSkill_too: Minimum Welding skill to repair water plants. Default: 5
Sandbox_EPR_WaterTankRequiresPower_toolt: Water tanks need power to function. Default: Off
Sandbox_EPR_ZombieAttractionEnabled_tool: Repairs and startup attract nearby zombies. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_ZombieAttractionMultiplier_t: How many zombies are attracted. Higher = more zombies. Default: 1.0
Sandbox_EPR_StormBlackoutsEnabled_toolti: During thunderstorms, an online substation has a chance per 10-minute tick of being knocked offline (lightning strike). Player must repair it. Default: On
Sandbox_EPR_StormBlackoutChancePerCheck_: Chance per 10-minute storm tick that a random online substation gets knocked offline. 0 disables. Default: 25
Sandbox_EPR_StormBlackoutRequireThunder_: If on, blackouts only trigger during actual thunderstorms. If off, heavy rain also counts. Default: On
